titleStmt.title: SII 9.174: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 174. (A.R. No. 95-A of 1904.) ON THE SAME SLAB.

summary.p: This records the gift of the vṛitti lands granted by Mahādēvī, wife of a certain Nādēva-Ghaissa for the service of the god Vīra-Kēśavadēva. It is not dated but is engraved in characters similar to those of No. 173 and in its continuation.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīvīrakēśavadēvara śrīmānyada sthaḷavṛttiya gadde taṁbulageṟeya gadde ka 100
mācisaṭṭiyakeṟeya haḷuginoḷage ka 200 matteṁ mūḍaṇabayala gadde ka 100 kappurageṟega
dde ka 100 beṇagarakeṟeya gadde ka 100 koḷagada sōmayya naṁdādīvigege biṭṭa maṇalakeyi kaḷalegeṟeyo
ḷage ma 1 māḷigeya nādēvaghaissana heṇḍati mahadēvikavve śrīvīrakēśavadēvaraṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōganivēdyakke
dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa tōṭasthaḷada yāvarugaṇḍada tamma bhūmiyoḷage baḍagaṇa bhā
gadalu tōṭa kaṁ 60 bāguḷi modalāgi hanneraḍu haḷḷiyalu hoṟagaṇiṁ bandu māṟida
hattiyāya śrīvīrakēśavadēvara naṁdādīvigegeyaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷu biṭṭa dharmma . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō
harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.174 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
